title: evolvulus goyazensis
intro: Evolvulus goyazensis, also known as the Brazilian dwarf morning glory or Dwarf Blue Daze, is a flowering plant native to Brazil in South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Evolvulus goyazensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
